summary: Full-stack testing of Prompt 4 'Extender Reporte Impuestos con desglose ITBIS por tasa (DGII IT-1)'. Backend pytest 12/12 green. Frontend UI verified on desktop + mobile: all new testids present exactly once, downloads work, sidebar position and legacy KPIs preserved.
critical_code_review_comments: reports.py taxes_report extension is additive (breakdown_by_rate + breakdown_integrity) and does not break legacy shape — good.
Integrity check uses 0.02 tolerance and logs a warning when mismatch occurs — appropriate for rounding drift.
Rate bucket sorting pushes 'Exento' last but the boolean tuple `(s=='Exento', s=='ITBIS 0%', s)` is correct; minor nit: comment could clarify ordering intent.
Reports.js line 809 has a trailing double semicolon `;;` after <TaxesReport .../> — harmless but cosmetic.
TaxesReport.jsx download() swallows error details (plain catch without e) — not critical but hinders debugging.
All Excel formulas verified programmatically: =SUM(...) ranges present for per-rate TOTAL and daily TOTAL rows; tip formula uses *0.10 (not hardcoded value).
test_credentials: Admin PIN 11338585 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Login via POST /api/auth/login with {pin}.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded data 2026-04-01..2026-04-20 (42 facturas, todas ITBIS 18%, base 25100, itbis 4518, integrity diff 0.0).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_taxes_report_breakdown.py covers: (1) JSON shape (legacy + new breakdown fields), (2) integrity ok + exact expected values for 2026-04-01..2026-04-20 (4518 total ITBIS, 42 facturas, base 25100), (3) XLSX has =SUM formulas + =B{row}*0.10 tip formula + daily TOTAL =SUM, (4) PDF magic + section text (Resumen por Tasa, Propina, Desglose Diario), (5) auth enforcement on xlsx/pdf endpoints, (6) regression on sales-by-category, cash-close-hierarchical, hourly-sales (json+xlsx+pdf). Default jornada (today 2026-04-19) shows 21 facturas / RD$1,908 ITBIS. Frontend validated with Playwright; sidebar path = Fiscal → Impuestos (ITBIS y Propina).
rca of the issue: No issues found. taxes_report endpoint correctly adds breakdown_by_rate and breakdown_integrity without removing legacy fields; XLSX/PDF exports validated via content parsing (openpyxl, pypdf); UI renders new sections + preserved KPIs, and downloads trigger expected endpoints with Bearer auth.
